title: Fav Track
wikitext:
[]: Fav Track?             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Jan 04, 2006 1:12 am Just lookigg around some old posts I came across the rEvangelion track. now this is a very very bad song lol, but it got me thinking. What is your favorit eva track? Air II for me

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Jan 04, 2006 1:40 am Refrain of the Soul followed by Cruel Angel's These (full version, not TV size), and lastly the NERV theme.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele_05 » Thu Jan 05, 2006 12:05 am Soul Refrain, Cruel Angel's Thesis (the version in wich Misato, Asuka and Rei sing it toghether), all the bach classics, pachelbel's cannon and the 9th symphony those are the best anyone care to post the WORST of the track?

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Thu Jan 05, 2006 5:04 am Best Tracks - Komm, Susser Todd, Air, Jesu, Joy of Man's Desire (or whatever it's called.), Infantile Dependance, Adult Dependancy, Cruel Angel Thesis (all versions), Beethoven's 9th Symphony, Hostility Restrained, The Heady Feeling of Freedom, Introjection, Seperation Anxiety... Eh... There's many more I'm just going to call it good for now. Worst Track - Asuka's Theme. Seriously, I feel like I should be floatin' down the Mississippi River on a wooden raft with a straw hat, banjo and the kid from Deliveriance.

[]:             Quote Post by aranami » Thu Jan 05, 2006 9:10 am Kanon, Joy, the piano version of the opening theme in ep.26

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Thu Jan 05, 2006 1:19 pm :O The Beast , Angel Attack, Jesus Bleibet Meine Freud (sp?), and Tamashii no Rufuran. Lol, secret hidden messages

[]:             Quote Post by xiuxiu » Thu Jan 05, 2006 2:59 pm I like the "Aya London Beat Version" of fly me to the moon on 3. I like fly me to the moon and cruel angel's thesis. Also Happiness is the Smell of Sin.

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Fri Jan 06, 2006 6:29 am What was the name of the small chello piece in Death and Rebirth? It was during the bit with Misato telling Shinji to get out of here and Touji saying him and Kensuke were leaving but not blaming Shinji for what happened from ep. 4.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele_05 » Fri Jan 06, 2006 8:55 am cello suite no 1, "prelude" by Johan Sebastian Bach. that was the name of the piece, trowa. but i think it has a diferent name in the track....something about childhood memories, shut away.....?

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Fri Jan 06, 2006 10:13 am favorites: "Rei iii" and "expansion of blockage". anti-faves: "spending time in preparation" and "false regeneration" (AHHHHHHHH!!)

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sat Jan 07, 2006 8:24 pm Ode to Joy, if that counts, otherwiser Komm Susser Tod and Zankoku na Tenshi. Shnooks wrote: :O The Beast , Angel Attack, Jesus Bleibet Meine Freud (sp?), and Tamashii no Rufuran. Lol, secret hidden messages

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jan 07, 2006 8:42 pm I'd have to add the Beast II, I like that track, good for working out. I can't stand to listen to Rei I anymore, not after watching the Naoko strangling and suicide scene, too depressing.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sat Jan 07, 2006 9:04 pm anyone like the jetalone theme? lol

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sun Jan 08, 2006 7:16 am you talking about the 'Nerv' track right? it rocks for sure! favorite tracks: Thanatos > Rei II > Rei I > Cruel Angel's Thesis > Nerv > Rei III (sounds a lot like the legendary Robotech!) > Good or Don't Be > Eva-02 > I'm bored of writing worst track?........hmmm....I remember of a mind-exterminating track in which there was a crappy voilin playing (i think it's from death) but I cannot remember the name.......it was really awful though..

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jan 09, 2006 12:06 pm sad viloin or something, Asuka is supposed to be playing i beleieve in DnR. I have the song on my limewire too if its the song that I'm thinking of. I didn't this it was that bad, but Shinji's cello solo is far better.

[]:             Quote Post by AcesHigh » Wed Jan 18, 2006 9:20 pm Any of the classical tracks. Komm, sÃ¼sser Tod. And of course, Cruel Angel's Thesis.

[]:             Quote Post by Archon Divinus » Wed Jan 18, 2006 9:33 pm Probably Cruel Angel Thesis and Komm, sÃ¼sser Tod. I find myself singing Cruel Angel Thesis at least once a week.

[]:             Quote Post by AcesHigh » Wed Jan 18, 2006 9:39 pm Such J poppy goodness!

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Thu Jan 19, 2006 3:41 am no one has mentioned hedgehogs dillemma?

[]: ^_^             Quote Post by chiefen » Thu Jan 19, 2006 7:00 am Six Winged Angel wrote: you talking about the 'Nerv' track right? it rocks for sure! favorite tracks: Thanatos > Rei II > Rei I > Cruel Angel's Thesis > Nerv > Rei III (sounds a lot like the legendary Robotech!) > Good or Don't Be > Eva-02 > I'm bored of writing worst track?........hmmm....I remember of a mind-exterminating track in which there was a crappy voilin playing (i think it's from death) but I cannot remember the name.......it was really awful though..
